items.title: Russia says Cuba situation is escalating after deadly incident with U.S.-tagged speedboat
items.description: The incident comes at a time of heightened tensions between Washington and Havana.

items.title: Congress pushes back against Nvidia, White House with chip export limits
items.description: A bipartisan group of lawmakers in both chambers is working to limit advanced chip exports to China.

items.title: Warren calls Trump’s bluff on affordability after State of the Union
items.description: Trump laid blame on Democrats for affordability and argued his administration has solved the problem, as polls consistently show increased concern fro...

items.title: World Economic Forum CEO quits after Epstein ties scrutinized
items.description: The president and CEO of the World Economic Forum, Borge Brende, steps down after Epstein ties scrutinized.

items.title: U.S. warns Iran's reluctance to discuss weapons is a 'big, big problem' as fresh talks begin
items.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio warned that Iran's reluctance to discuss its intercontinental ballistic missiles was a "big, big problem."
